review_date: Reviewed in the United States on March 6, 2026
review_text: This ESR case for the iPhone 17 Pro is a great combination of protection and style. I like the clear back because it lets the phone's design show through while still providing solid protection. The case feels very sturdy and well made. It has military-grade drop protection, and the corners seem reinforced, which gives me confidence that it will protect the phone from everyday drops and bumps. The fit is also perfect-snug without being difficult to put on or remove. One of the best features is the MagSafe compatibility. The magnets are strong and hold securely with chargers and accessories, which is really convenient. The camera protection and raised edges are also nice touches that help keep the lenses and screen from contacting surfaces. Overall, this is a great clear case if you want reliable protection, strong MagSafe performance, and a clean look without adding a lot of bulk to your phone. Highly recommended.

review_date: Reviewed in the United States on December 14, 2025
review_text: Updated Review: After two months of use, the case is starting to look a little dirty, especially the raised edges (see third photo). Not sure if it's because I wear a lot of black so when I put the phone in my pockets, the dye from the clothes gets on it, or if it's for other reasons. On the flip side, I'm really appreciating the strength of the magnet as it holds my pop socket super well. I had gotten another case to use on and off (just like switching up the look) and that magnet was not very strong and my pop socket came off easily. Also, that case was even more slippery than this one. So still keeping this at a 4 stars. Original Review: I got the Designed for iPhone 17 Pro Max Case, Compatible with MagSafe, [Camera Protection] [15FT Military Drop Protection] Shockproof Translucent Matte Anti-Slip Phone Case, 6.9", 6.9", Pink for my new phone. This quality of the case seem good. I have not dropped my phone (knock on wood) so I'm not sure of the durability, but it seems solid. The silicon case is a bit slick (this is my first one of this kind) and the textured lines on the sides which are supposed to help with grip may help slightly. Magnet is sound as it holds my pop socket well without any issues and I can use MagSafe charger without any problems. It is a good fit for the iPhone 17 pro max. A few things I noted that are cons IMO: I got the pink color and it's a little bit of a dusty pink rather than the pale soft brighter pink shown in the picture. I was also hoping the camera button on the side would be covered but it is not. Finally, the camera lens protection seems just slight off as you can see the rim.

review_text: I purchased this case and overall I really love it. The case fits perfectly, feels sturdy, and provides great protection without making the phone bulky. I also appreciated that it came with a screen protector. My only small issue is the color my phone is white, and I should have ordered the case in white for a better match. That said, the case itself is still high quality and looks nice. The process of applying the screen protector and the case was very simple. Overall, this is a great protective case and definitely worth purchasing. I'd just recommend choosing your color carefully!
